productDisplayName: Puma Men Budoka White Sports Shoes
description: puma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalistic design in high-end athletic shoes. A walking shoe, the Budoka is replete with features to enhance performance. Team this with performance clothes when hitting the track or the gym, or simply pair it with jeans and a T-shirt.UpperSynthetic leather upper with a contrast overlay and stitch detail for durability Concealed asymmetric lacing system to make a fashion statementSlip on system for ease of wearPadded inner and collar for absolute comfortMidsolePadded foot-bed with stitch detailing for all-day comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleTPU outsole with textured concentric circles emanating from the pivot points for absolute grip and tractionPivot points on the heel and toe mound region and flex grooves for added gripMildly curved forefoot for better tractionOutsole reinforced on to the upper for enhanced durabilityShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
